steps.description: Add retry counter and maximum retry limit
steps.requiredChange: Implement maxRetries constant and retry counter in executePaymentWithRetry
steps.evidenceRequired: Tests show retry stops after max attempts, no infinite loops

steps.requiredChange: Add exponential backoff delay based on attempt number (e.g., 2^attempt * baseDelay)
steps.evidenceRequired: Retry delays increase exponentially, logs show backoff timing

steps.requiredChange: Check for existing transaction id before processing new payment
steps.evidenceRequired: Duplicate payment requests return existing transaction, no double charges

steps.description: Add distributed lock mechanism for concurrent retries
steps.requiredChange: Implement lock acquisition/release for payment id to prevent race conditions
steps.evidenceRequired: Concurrent retry attempts coordinate correctly, no race conditions

haltCondition: All admissibility rules satisfied: exponential backoff, max retry limit, idempotency, and distributed coordination implemented
